organ_wiring.name: AGENT_LIFE_LAUNCHER_V1
organ_wiring.notes: Owner-facing canonical launch; only DurationMinutes should be required.

organ_wiring.name: AUTONOMOUS_INNER_MOTOR_RUNNER
organ_wiring.notes: Internal runner only; should be invoked by canonical launcher, not by Owner directly.

organ_wiring.name: ACTION_DECISION_SELECTOR
organ_wiring.notes: Selector is called by runner and controls candidate path selection.

organ_wiring.name: MEMORY_TO_NEXT_PATH_REUSE_GATE_V1
organ_wiring.notes: Wired through runner proof pack and selector action candidate.

organ_wiring.name: MENTAL_FRONTIER_EXPANSION_GATE_V1
organ_wiring.notes: Wired through runner proof pack and selector action candidate.

organ_wiring.name: MENTAL_FRONTIER_ROUTER_V1
organ_wiring.notes: Wired through runner proof pack and selector action candidate.

organ_wiring.name: BODY_SELF_INSPECTION_CIRCUIT_V1
organ_wiring.notes: Built/proven separately; router may reference body_self_inspection_signal, but circuit is not invoked by canonical agent life yet.

conclusion.strongest_risk: Historical runtime wrappers exist and can confuse humans, but tracked code has a canonical launcher path. BODY_SELF_INSPECTION_CIRCUIT_V1 is proven separately and currently frontier-referenced, not invoked by canonical AIMO life.
conclusion.do_not_use: Do not manually launch old .runtime/live_trials wrappers or raw run_autonomous_inner_motor variants as Owner-facing life runs.
